description: Outcome evals for mdmind agent skills. The suite is runner-neutral: agents fill outputs/ and scripts/skill_eval.py grades artifacts deterministically where possible.

cases.title: Author a meeting notes action map
cases.prompt: Turn the meeting notes in inputs/notes.md into a native mdmind map. Keep the tree easy to scan, preserve decisions and follow-up work, add ids only to durable branches, and write the result to outputs/map.md.

inputs.content:
Product sync notes

People: Jason, Priya, Theo

Decision: keep the beta invite-only until onboarding copy is clear.
Decision: do not ship the analytics panel in the first beta.

Follow-ups:
- Priya drafts onboarding copy by Tuesday.
- Theo checks whether the empty-state copy is still accurate.
- Jason creates a small launch checklist and marks analytics as deferred.

Context: The team wants a durable handoff map, not a transcript. The open risk is that beta users may misunderstand setup if the copy is vague.

cases.title: Synthesize research into evidence and questions
cases.prompt: Convert inputs/research.md into an mdmind research synthesis map at outputs/map.md. Separate themes, evidence, open questions, and next actions. Use detail lines for nuance rather than long labels.

inputs.content:
Research dump

Users like local-first notes because they can inspect and edit them without a service dependency. Two interviewees said ids matter only after a map starts being reused. One maintainer warned that too many metadata fields make maps feel like spreadsheets. Open question: how should agents decide when to add relations? Next action: compare a sparse map and a heavily annotated map on the same source material.

cases.title: Pick the narrow CLI query for blocked owned work
cases.prompt: Using inputs/agent-todo-workflow.md, find blocked work owned by Jason. Prefer the smallest mdm command sequence that answers the question. Write the answer and command sequence to outputs/response.md.

cases.title: Choose raw export JSON instead of command envelopes
cases.prompt: Export active todo branches from inputs/agent-todo-workflow.md as raw map JSON for a downstream tool. Write the command rationale to outputs/response.md and the JSON artifact to outputs/export.json.
